rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions; Motion For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Plaintiff's Motion to have Plaintiff's Requests for Admissions and Genuineness of Documents to Defendant Ronald Mazzaferro deemed admitted and for sanctions is Granted. Each of the Requests for Admission and Genuineness of Documents is deemed admitted. Plaintiff's request for sanctions in the amount of $5,200 is granted shall be paid within ten days. Any party who contests the tentative must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing parties by 5:00 p.m. on 1/14/2014. Prevailing party to prepare order.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Have Plaintiffs Requests For Admissions And Genuineness Of Documents To Defendant Ronald Mazzaferro Deemed Admitted; Or In The Alternative A Motion To Compel; Motion For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Plaintiff's Motion for an Order Establishing Admissions and for Sanctions as to Great Sunset Ventures (GSV) is denied as premature. On August 22, 2013 the Court granted plaintiff's first Motion to Compel further responses to Requests for Admission from GSV. On December 30, 2013, the Court granted plaintiff's second Motion to Compel Further Responses to Requests for Admission from Defendant GSV and ordered GSV to provide further responses including any privilege log within ten days of 12/30/2013. Plaintiff's third Motion to Compel was filed on 12/20/2013 before the due date of further responses. Any party who contests the tentative must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 5:00 p.m.1/14/2014. Prevailing party to prepare order.
